text.title: compaction-preserve-refs Procedure
text.summary: Five-step compaction pipeline: trigger, prompt, generate, validate, persist.

step.name: detect-trigger
step.input: Current conversation buffer + context window utilization metric.
step.action: Compute utilization (tokens used / window). Fire compaction if utilization > 0.85 OR turn count > configured threshold (default 30).
step.decision-gate: If false, return without compaction. If true, proceed.

step.name: bind-prompt
step.input: Conversation buffer, the schema template, the workspace path roots.
step.action: Load `templates/compaction-prompt.txt`, substitute the active goal and the workspace prefixes, append the buffer.

step.name: run-inference
step.action: Invoke a haiku-tier model in JSON-emitting mode (no free-form preamble). Cap output at 1500 tokens.
step.decision-gate: If raw output contains text outside the YAML document, reject and retry once with a stricter prompt.

step.name: validate
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-compaction-preserve-refs.py` against the YAML. Check every rule from `content/01-core-rules.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If validation fails with a missing-key error, retry once with the failing key called out in the prompt. If it fails twice, escalate to sonnet.

step.name: persist-and-replace
step.action: Write the YAML to the agent's checkpoint store (same store as conversation state). Replace the prior conversation buffer with a single system message containing the YAML.
step.output: Updated agent state; next turn reads from the compacted message.
